title: vigna pubigera var. benuensis
intro: Vigna pubigera var. benuensis, also known as Vigna benuensis, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, specifically a variety of the Vigna pubigera plant. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Vigna benuensis may include tea infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
